info.name: Shopping Orchestrator AI - Complete API Collection
info.description:
Full API collection for the Shopping Orchestrator AI microservices system.

Services:
- Eureka Server: http://localhost:8761
- API Gateway: http://localhost:8080
- Orchestrator: http://localhost:8081
- Product Research Agent: http://localhost:8082
- Comparison Agent: http://localhost:8083
- Budget Agent: http://localhost:8084
- Recommendation Agent: http://localhost:8085

Start order:
1. Eureka Server (8761)
2. All agents (8082-8085)
3. Orchestrator (8081)
4. API Gateway (8080)

request.description: Check if Orchestrator service is running
Check if Product Research Agent is running

Main orchestrator endpoint - searches for smartphones under ₹30,000 with camera and battery preferences

Search for gaming laptops under ₹80,000
Search for Smart TVs under ₹40,000
Search via API Gateway (port 8080) - routes to orchestrator
Get all past search history (user preferences memory)
Get specific search history by ID
Get search history via API Gateway
Directly call Product Research Agent to find smartphones
Directly call Product Research Agent to find laptops
Directly call Product Research Agent to find headphones

request.description: Get final recommendation based on comparison results

STEP 1: Full end-to-end flow via API Gateway.

This single call:
1. Orchestrator receives request
2. Calls Product Research Agent → finds products
3. Calls Comparison Agent → compares products
4. Calls Budget Agent → filters by budget
5. Calls Recommendation Agent → picks best
6. Returns complete structured response

Expected Response Structure:
- userRequirement: {productType, budget, preferences, category}
- researchedProducts: [array of products]
- comparisonResult: {featureComparison, prosAndCons, summary}
- budgetAnalysis: {productsWithinBudget, cheaperAlternatives, costVsValueInsight}
- recommendationResult: {bestProduct, reasonForRecommendation, alternativeOptions, finalDecision}
- processingTimeMs: number
- status: 'SUCCESS'
STEP 2: After searching, view the saved search history (user preferences memory feature)
STEP 3: Search for laptops - demonstrates the system works for different product categories
STEP 4: Search for headphones - tests budget optimization with lower budget
STEP 5: View updated history showing all 3 searches saved
Open Eureka dashboard to see all registered services
Get all registered services in JSON format
